scripts.build: node tools/data/build-populated-places.mjs && node tools/data/build-catalog.mjs && node tools/data/validate-datasets.mjs && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.data:build: node tools/data/build-populated-places.mjs && node tools/data/build-catalog.mjs && node tools/data/validate-datasets.mjs
scripts.check: node tools/data/build-populated-places.mjs && node tools/data/build-catalog.mjs && node tools/data/validate-datasets.mjs && tsc --noEmit && vitest run && vite build
